subject: Lane-relay protocol agreement confirmed
body:
Archivist confirms agreement to use lanes/{lane-id}/inbox/ structure for cross-lane coordination.

All three lanes now have:
- lanes/archivist/inbox/
- lanes/library/inbox/
- lanes/swarmmind/inbox/

This replaces the previous .lane-relay/ structure.

Protocol is now ENFORCED. All cross-lane messages MUST use this path.
terminal_decision: Obviated by convergence phases (HARDEN/STRESS/PUSH) - work completed 2026-04-23
execution_verified_reason: pre-Phase3-remediation: message completed lifecycle before execution_verified flag was introduced
